options.label: Grid
options.description: Evenly spaced items in straight rows and columns - the classic, predictable, clean look.

options.label: Masonry
options.description: Pinterest-style columns that fit items snugly without cropping. Ideal for editorial layouts.

options.label: Justified
options.description: Equal-height rows that fill each line edge-to-edge. Great for big galleries of mixed proportions.

options.label: Slider
options.description: Flexible, highly interactive slider with full control over items per view, timing, and navigation.

options.label: Image Viewer
options.description: Distraction-free single-image view with subtle controls - built to keep focus on the photo.

options.label: Single Item
options.description: Shows one item at a time. Best paired with random sort for a rotating spotlight on each load.

options.label: Featured Item
options.description: Lead with a featured photo beside a compact grid, reveal everything on Show All.

options.label: Instant Photos
options.description: Turns any gallery into a playful wall of instant-style prints - perfect for a relaxed, casual feel.

options.label: Video Playlist
options.description: Embedded video player paired with a thumbnail playlist for video-led galleries.

options.label: Mixed Tiles
options.description: A mosaic magazine-style layout where items span different numbers of rows and columns.

options.label: Carousel
options.description: Horizontal strip of items the visitor can slide or swipe through - compact and touch-friendly.

options.label: Product Gallery
options.description: Hero image plus thumbnail strip, built for shop and product pages - the perfect e-commerce companion.

settings.label: Featured Image Side
settings.description: Which side the large featured image sits on. The grid fills the other half.

settings.label: Grid Items
settings.description: How many items the grid shows beside the featured image.

settings.subtitle: About the Show All button
settings.message: The Show all button appears automatically when the gallery has more photos than the featured image and grid can show. It opens a full-screen grid of every item.

settings.label: Button Label
settings.description: The text shown on the Show all button.

settings.label: Button Position
settings.description: Which corner of the layout the Show all button sits in.

settings.label: Edge Offset
settings.description: Gap between the button and the edges of its corner.

settings.label: Item Aspect Ratio
settings.description: Shape of each item. Choose "None" to keep the image's original aspect ratio (only available for the Single Item layout).

settings.label: Item Fit
settings.description: How the image fills its container.

settings.label: Maximum Rotation
settings.description: Each item is randomly tilted between minus and plus this angle. Set to 0 to keep all items straight.

settings.label: Action on Mouseover
settings.description: How each item reacts when the visitor hovers over it.

settings.label: Frame Thickness
settings.description: Width of the white photo border around each image.

settings.label: Elevation
settings.description: Soft shadow under each item, lit from above.

settings.label: Add Sticker
settings.description: Decorative tape strip across the top of each item.

settings.label: Hide on Mouseover
settings.description: Fade the sticker out when the visitor hovers over the item.

settings.label: Columns Mode
settings.description: Choose between fixed number of columns or auto-responsive columns

settings.label: Number of Columns
settings.description: Fixed number of columns for each device

settings.label: Column Width Range
settings.description: Set the minimum and maximum width for each column. Columns will automatically adjust based on available space.

settings.label: Item Order
settings.description: Row-major fills each row before moving down. Column-major arranges items top to bottom, column by column.

settings.label: Items Per View
settings.description: How many items are visible in the slider at once for each device.

settings.label: Height Mode
settings.description: Auto sizes the viewport from the Item Aspect Ratio and the number of items per view. Fixed uses an explicit pixel height.

settings.label: Fixed Height
settings.description: Viewport height for each device. Items keep their aspect ratio inside this height.

settings.label: Maximum Height
settings.description: Limits how tall the viewport can grow. Use 0 for no limit. Only applies when Height Mode is Auto.

settings.label: Target Row Height
settings.description: Approximate height of each row. Actual row heights vary slightly so images can fill the row.

settings.label: Row Height Tolerance
settings.description: How much actual row height can deviate from the target. Higher values give more freedom to fit images per row.

settings.label: Last Row Behavior
settings.description: How to handle the {postType}'s final row when it does not fill the full width. With pagination on, this only applies to the very last page; trailing rows on intermediate pages are controlled by the Pagination tab.

settings.label: Max Rows
settings.description: Limit the number of rows. 0 means unlimited.

settings.subtitle: About Page Trailing Row
settings.message:
When a page does not divide evenly into rows, the last row often shows just one or two items with a lot of empty space on the end.
Choose how to handle the last row of each page when there are more pages after it. The {postType}'s actual final row still follows the Last Row Behavior setting on the Rows tab.

settings.label: Page Trailing Row
settings.description: Pick how the trailing row of every intermediate page is handled.

settings.label: Adjustment Window
settings.description: How far the actual items-per-page count is allowed to drift from the configured value. 20% of a 20-item page means 16 to 24 items.

settings.label: Clean Row Threshold
settings.description: Treat the last row as clean when it fills at least this much of the container width. Above the threshold the page is left alone; below it, items are added or removed within the adjustment window.

settings.label: Snap Direction
settings.description: How to choose between adding more items or removing the last few. Auto removes items when the last row is less than half full and adds items when it is more than half full.
